description: Create an auto-reply workflow for warranty claims. Create a template with the subject 'Warranty Claim Received - Status Update' and the body: 'Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.' Configure an enabled message filter named 'Warranty Auto-Reply' that replies with this template when the subject contains 'Warranty Claim'. Do not run the filter on existing messages.

metadata.expected_template_body: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your warranty claim and our support team will review it within 48 business hours. Please retain this email for your records.
